headline: The Hidden Supply Chain Behind Every SpaceX Launch
summary: Rothschild analysts say Linde, which has fueled NASA launches for 60 years, is set to capitalize on SpaceX's Starship ramp with up to $6M in revenue per launch by 2028.

raw.headline: The Hidden Supply Chain Behind Every SpaceX Launch

headline: Is International Flavors & Fragrances Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Despite trailing the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, International Flavors & Fragrances remains a Wall Street favorite, with analysts maintaining a highly bullish outlook on the stock.
